daily_fact: Stay engaged with your community through local news and civic participation.
topline_md: A tragic fire in Queens claimed the lives of four individuals, including a 3-year-old girl, while severe storms caused widespread damage and travel disruptions across New York and New Jersey, highlighting ongoing safety and infrastructure challenges in the region.
